'''Jorek''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Yinchorri/Legends|Yinchorri]] and a member of the [[Council of Elders (Yinchorri)|Council of Elders]]<ref name="CSWE" /> in [[33 BBY/Legends|33 BBY]]. He, along with his fellow councilors, was convinced by [[Vilmarh Grahrk]] to [[Raid on the Golden Nyss Shipyards|raid]] the [[Golden Nyss Shipyards]].
